name: protoc
description: Protocol Buffers — protoc compiler for generating language bindings

globalOptions.name: --proto_path / -I
globalOptions.description: Specify import search path for proto files

globalOptions.name: --encode
globalOptions.description: Encode text-format message from stdin to binary

globalOptions.name: --decode
globalOptions.description: Decode binary message from stdin to text-format

globalOptions.name: --descriptor_set_in
globalOptions.description: Read descriptor set from file instead of proto

globalOptions.name: --plugin
globalOptions.description: Specify a plugin executable for code generation

globalOptions.name: --dry-run
globalOptions.description: Preview what would happen without making changes

globalOptions.name: --log-level
globalOptions.description: Set logging level (error, warn, info, debug)

subcommands.name: --go_out=. file.proto
subcommands.description: Generate Go code from proto definitions

subcommands.name: --python_out=. file.proto
subcommands.description: Generate Python code from proto definitions

subcommands.name: --js_out=. file.proto
subcommands.description: Generate JavaScript code from proto definitions

subcommands.name: --java_out=. file.proto
subcommands.description: Generate Java code from proto definitions

subcommands.name: --cpp_out=. file.proto
subcommands.description: Generate C++ code from proto definitions
